series_metadata.series_description: Contains name, address, county and data general and detail plans received for pubic water supply and sludge management plan approvals within the district.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: 5 yers in operating area. data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed use- ful and hardcopy microfilm is checked quality and completeness
